testimonial: Artisanal Restoration returned my phone call immediately and came out the next day to evaluate our home repair project. Not only did Randall show up on time, but instead of just providing a quote and leaving, he actually undertook the repairs immediately. We were so impressed by his professionalism and knowledge. He made excellent suggestions about ways to reduce the cost of our repairs and provided us with alternatives. His workmanship was excellent and he arrived with his own vacuum! I couldn't tell when I got home that a ceiling repair was done. There was no dust anywhere. We are delighted to have found this company and will absolutely be using them for all our carpentry and home repair projects in the future.
